articles.title: From flat jokes, to politics, to red-carpet dazzle: 5 experts unpack the 2026 Oscars
articles.excerpt: Between the glitzy celebration of cinematic escapism, and constant reminders of our dark and complicated world, this year’s ceremony felt somewhat disjointed.
articles.content: Despite Conan OBrien joking he was the last human Oscars host, the 2026 edition was exceptionally human with folly, filler and an f-bomb (ironically during the Best Sound acceptance speech). This 3.5…

articles.title: IDBI Bank shares plunge 16% amid reports of stake sale cancellation
